item.title: Some Will Get Angry But Children Need Their Fathers!
item.description: A powerful conversation about why fathers play a crucial role in a child’s life and development

media:content.media:description: A powerful conversation about why fathers play a crucial role in a child’s life and development

item.title: Will men approach women at a gas station?
item.description: A social experiment exploring whether men make the first move when they see women at a gas station

item.title: This has to be a joke
item.description: There’s no way this situation can actually be real.

media:content.media:description: There’s no way this situation can actually be real.

item.title: Men don’t think you’re flirting…
item.description: A lot of men completely miss the signs women think are obvious flirting.

media:content.media:title: Men don’t think you’re flirting…
media:content.media:description: A lot of men completely miss the signs women think are obvious flirting.

item.title: Ladies, You Shouldn't Treat Men Like This!
item.description: Respect matters, and many men won’t tolerate being treated this way.

media:content.media:title: Ladies, You Shouldn't Treat Men Like This!
media:content.media:description: Respect matters, and many men won’t tolerate being treated this way.

item.title: This is something a lot of women don’t understand…
item.description: A lot of women miss how deeply this affects the men they care about.

media:content.media:title: This is something a lot of women don’t understand…
media:content.media:description: A lot of women miss how deeply this affects the men they care about.

item.description: Tell me I’m not the only one thinking this!

item.title: That Good, Balanced Relationship
item.description: Real relationships thrive when both people bring balance, respect, and effort.

media:content.media:title: That Good, Balanced Relationship
media:content.media:description: Real relationships thrive when both people bring balance, respect, and effort.

item.title: A man that is appreciated will move mountains…
item.description: Appreciation can inspire a man to give his all in a relationship.

media:content.media:title: A man that is appreciated will move mountains…
media:content.media:description: Appreciation can inspire a man to give his all in a relationship.

item.title: Men don’t like to be tested this way…
item.description: Most men see this as a red flag instead of a playful relationship test.

media:content.media:title: Men don’t like to be tested this way…
media:content.media:description: Most men see this as a red flag instead of a playful relationship test.

item.title: Women Do Men Dirty
item.description: Some relationship stories really make you question how people treat each other.

media:content.media:description: Some relationship stories really make you question how people treat each other.

item.title: Would you file for divorce after this?
item.description: After hearing what happened, would you stay married or walk away?

item.title: He’s changing his entire run so he doesn’t scare her; do you agree or disagree?
item.description: A small change for her comfort or going too far to avoid being misunderstood?

media:content.media:title: He’s changing his entire run so he doesn’t scare her; do you agree or disagree?
media:content.media:description: A small change for her comfort or going too far to avoid being misunderstood?

item.title: She used to have some good takes, but this one was bad…
item.description: She usually makes solid points, but this take completely missed the mark.

media:content.media:title: She used to have some good takes, but this one was bad…
media:content.media:description: She usually makes solid points, but this take completely missed the mark.
